scripts.version:stamp: node -e "const d=new Date();const v=d.getFullYear()+'.'+String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')+'.'+String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0')+'.'+String(d.getHours()).padStart(2,'0');require('fs').writeFileSync('src/version.js','// Auto-generated\nexport const APP_VERSION = \''+v+'\'\n');console.log('Version:',v)"
